/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/qt-map1_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/OverlayItem.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/FloatGridMaterial.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/qt-map1_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_MapApp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/qt-map1_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/qt-map1_main_qml.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qt-map1_raw_qml_0.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/qt-map1.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_floatgrid_shaders.cpp.o" -o qt-map1 -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtQuickControls2.framework/Versions/A/QtQuickControls2 /opt/homebrew/lib/QtLocation.framework/Versions/A/QtLocation /opt/homebrew/lib/QtPositioningQuick.framework/Versions/A/QtPositioningQuick /opt/homebrew/lib/QtPositioning.framework/Versions/A/QtPositioning /opt/homebrew/lib/QtQuick.framework/Versions/A/QtQuick /opt/homebrew/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtQml.framework/Versions/A/QtQml /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
